content:
Ms. Gillian Silver, MPH, CPH, CRA, CFRA, CPRA is the Director, Office of Research Administration.

Office: Tyler Hall, Suite 304. Phone: 443-885-3541. Email: gillian.silver@morgan.edu.

Ms. Gillian Silver is the Director of the Office of Research Administration at Morgan State University. In addition to this role, she serves as Associate Director for Administration of the Morgan State University ASCEND Center for Biomedical Research and the Research Center for Minority Institutions (RCMI@Morgan) Center for Urban Health Disparities Research and Innovation. She is also the Finance Coordinator for the International Collaboration for Participatory Research.

Ms. Silver's experience includes serving as the Manager of the Johns Hopkins-based Mid-Atlantic Public Health Training Center; Coordinator of Public Health Practice at the Morgan State University School of Community Health and Policy; and Manager of Educational and Research Programs at the Association of Schools of Public Health. She also worked at the Women's and Children's Health Policy Center at the Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health.

She received her MPH from the Columbia University Mailman School of Public Health, is a Certified Research Administrator (CRA), Certified Financial Research Administrator (CFRA), and Certified Pre-Award Research Administrator (CPRA) through the Research Administrators Certification Council, and is Certified in Public Health (CPH) through the National Board of Public Health Examiners.

Education: MPH in Health Policy, Columbia University Mailman School of Public Health.

Certifications: Certification in Public Health (CPH) (National Board of Public Health Examiners; Certified Research Administrator (CRA) (Research Administrators Certification Council; Certified Financial Research Administrator (CFRA) (Research Administrators Certification Council; Certified Pre-Award Research Administrator (CPRA) (Research Administrators Certification Council.

Google Scholar profile: https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=mBHwSjoAAAAJ
